title: CobblemonSuperflat
description: It's like superflat but the Nether is also flat and biomes can change. Works on the Cobblemon 1.6 snapshots
body:
**Cobblemon Superflat** 
Cobblemon is a 1.21.1 datapack that combines the survival superflat gamemode with the cobblemon mod. Furthermore, This datapack improves upon the superflat experience through the use of flattening both the Nether and the End, as well as introducing recipes for functional biome/structure books in the hopes of extending gameplay and content within a survival superflat world. Simply add this datapack to your future world and enjoy hours of constant world improvement starting from the bare minimums!

**Current Books**
-Birch Forest biome book (new)
-Desert biome book (new)
-Dripstone Caves biome book (new)
-Plains biome book
-Forest biome book
-River biome book (new)
-Stony Peaks biome book (new)
-Taiga biome book

-Geode structure book
-Pewter Gym structure book (new, custom made)
-Sandy Den dig pit book (new)

**Future Plans**
While the books are more limited in the current version, more books will be added in future versions in both the structure and biome variety. Custom made buildings may also be added in the future.

**Notice**
This datapack runs on the Cobblemon 1.6 snapshots
